g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ctxeng select which files to include?')
sendPrompt('How does ctxeng score files with query and git recency?')
sendPrompt('How does ctxeng fit files into a token budget?')

sendPrompt('How does AST and Python import expansion work in ctxeng?')
